iterations.notes: First production version. Covers 9 hook events with event-selection table, hook type selection, if-field narrowing guidance, and safety checklist. Three eval scenarios included: happy-path formatter, broad-approval guard, and PostCompact re-injection.
known_gaps: HTTP and MCP tool hook types have no worked examples yet
No coverage of multi-hook ordering within the same event
Agent-type hooks have no dedicated example
improvements_needed: Add one example using http hook type for webhook notification
Add event ordering/priority documentation if Claude Code exposes it
Add a fourth scenario: blocking specific file deletion with PreToolUse + if
